name: emotional beat validation failure surfaces drift

source.purpose: Beats below the salience floor (0.5), with empty text, or with no emotional_tags must be dropped AND flagged. Silent drops hide archivist over-emission; visibility lets us calibrate the salience floor and tag vocabulary after observation.

input.playerInput: Hold the door open for them.

narrator.prose: The door swings into the cold; nothing about the moment particularly lands.
